_meta.description: realufo.org per-event geocode dump. Used by /map.html for case pins. Archive HQ centroids included as fallback.

cases.title: Rendlesham Forest, Dec 1980
cases.description: The Rendlesham Forest incident, 26–28 December 1980 — RAF Woodbridge / RAF Bentwaters. Halt memo, witness depositions, DEFE 24/1948 file. Offline-archived from the UK National Archives.

cases.title: Nimitz "Tic-Tac", November 2004
cases.description: The USS Nimitz / USS Princeton encounters, 10–16 November 2004, off Baja California. Cmdr David Fravor, FLIR1 footage, AAW exercise off Catalina. Offline-archived from DoD / AARO releases.

cases.title: Gimbal, January 2015
cases.description: The Gimbal encounter, 20 January 2015, east coast of the United States. F/A-18F Super Hornet ATFLIR pod footage, declassified by the Department of Defense in April 2020. Offline-archived from AARO releases.

cases.title: Phoenix Lights, March 1997
cases.description: The Phoenix Lights, 13 March 1997 — V-shaped craft observed by thousands across Arizona and the southwestern United States. Governor Symington's public confirmation a decade later. Offline-archived from DoD / Air Force…

cases.title: Belgian UFO Wave, 1989–90
cases.description: The Belgian UFO wave, November 1989 – April 1991 — triangular craft, F-16 scrambles, Belgian Air Force radar lock, public press conference by Colonel Wilfried De Brouwer. The most thoroughly documented military UAP…

cases.title: Operação Prato, 1977–78
cases.description: Operation Saucer (Operação Prato) — the Brazilian Air Force investigation into the Chupa-Chupa flap on the Pará coast, September 1977 to January 1978. Captain Hollanda's 500-page report, declassified 2005.

cases.title: Varginha, January 1996
cases.description: The Varginha incident, 20 January 1996 — three witnesses, a stranded entity, an Army deployment, and a soldier's contested death. Offline-archived from Brazilian Air Force and Ministério da Defesa records.

cases.title: Trindade Island, January 1958
cases.description: The Trindade Island incident, 16 January 1958 — Almirante Saldanha (NEE-15) deck witnesses photograph a Saturn-shaped UAP over the South Atlantic island. Photos certified by President Juscelino Kubitschek; the most…
